channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Prosecutors to present evidence against alleged assassin of Charlie Kirk
item.description: A judge will decide if prosecutors have enough evidence to proceed with a murder trial for the alleged assassin of conservative activist Charlie Kirk.

item.title: Telescope discovers most distant quasars ever observed
item.description: Quasars, the brightest objects in the universe, are powered by supermassive black holes at the centers of early galaxies.

item.title: Balogun's red card suspension lifted after Trump called FIFA chief, sources say
item.description: Balogun's reinstatement came after President Trump called FIFA President Gianni Infantino last week to ask whether the organization would review the...

item.title: At least 12 dead in large Russian attack on Kyiv day before NATO summit
item.description: All ballistic missiles launched by Russia struck their targets, highlighting Kyiv's need for more U.S. Patriot interceptor missiles, Ukraine officials...
